elements.section-2411-008: DMVV formula with the inclusion of topological charges
elements.sent-2411-271: In this appendix, we incorporate the topologically charged states carrying target-space momenta and windings, into the DMVV formula.
elements.sent-2411-272: Define the grand-canonical free energy $\mathcal{F}$ via \begin{equation}\mathcal{Z}[M_4]:=\sum_{N\ge0}p^N Z[\mathrm{sym}^N M_4]\equiv e^{\mathcal{F}[M_4]}.\end{equation}.
elements.sent-2411-273: One can write $\mathcal{F (q,\bar{q ,y,\bar{y )$ in terms of Hecke operators (generalizing the construction of \cite{Dijkgraaf:1996xw to include anti-holomorphic fugacities $\bar q,\bar y$, as well as the topological sectors) \begin{eqnarray}\mathcal{F}(q,\bar{q},y,\bar{y})= \sum_{N>0} p^N T_N \chi (M;q,y,\bar{q},\bar{y}) .\end{eqnarray}.}}}}
elements.sent-2411-274: The action of Hecke operators $T_N$ on the seed partition function can be written as \begin{eqnarray}T_N \chi(q,y,\bar{q},\bar{y})= \sum_{\substack{ad= N b \,mod \, d}} \frac{1}{N} \chi(\frac{a \tau +b}{d},\frac{a \bar{\tau} +b}{d}, a z, a \bar{z}).\end{eqnarray}.
elements.formula-2411-109: \begin{equation}T_N \chi(q,y,\bar{q},\bar{y})= \sum_{\substack{ad= N b \,mod \, d}} \frac{1}{N} \chi(\frac{a \tau +b}{d},\frac{a \bar{\tau} +b}{d}, a z, a \bar{z}).\end{equation}
elements.sent-2411-275: The seed partition function $\chi(q,\bar{q ,y,\bar{y )$ has Fourier expansion \begin{eqnarray}\chi(q,\bar{q},y,\bar{y})= \sum_{m_i,w_i} q^{\frac{\delta}{4}} \bar{q}^{\frac{\bar{\delta}}{4}} \sum_{\Delta,\bar{\Delta},\ell,\bar{\ell}} c(\Delta,\bar{\Delta},\ell,\bar{\ell}) q^{\Delta} \bar{q}^{\bar{\Delta}} y^{\ell} \bar{y}^{\bar{\ell}} .\end{eqnarray}.}}
elements.sent-2411-277: The action of Hecke operators on the seed partition function will have the Fourier expansion \begin{eqnarray}T_N \chi=\sum_{\substack{ad= N b \,mod \, d}} \frac{1}{a d} \sum_{\Delta,\bar{\Delta},\ell,\bar{\ell},m_i,w_i} c(\Delta,\bar{\Delta},\ell,\bar{\ell}) q^{\frac{a}{d}\Delta+\frac{a}{d}\frac{\delta}{4}} \bar{q}^{\frac{a}{d}\bar{\Delta}+\frac{a}{d}\frac{\bar{\delta}}{4}} y^{a\ell} \bar{y}^{ a\bar{\ell}} e^{2 \pi i \frac{b}{d}(\Delta- \bar{\Delta}+m_i w_i)}.\end{eqnarray}.
elements.formula-2411-111: \begin{equation}T_N \chi=\sum_{\substack{ad= N b \,mod \, d}} \frac{1}{a d} \sum_{\Delta,\bar{\Delta},\ell,\bar{\ell},m_i,w_i} c(\Delta,\bar{\Delta},\ell,\bar{\ell}) q^{\frac{a}{d}\Delta+\frac{a}{d}\frac{\delta}{4}} \bar{q}^{\frac{a}{d}\bar{\Delta}+\frac{a}{d}\frac{\bar{\delta}}{4}} y^{a\ell} \bar{y}^{ a\bar{\ell}} e^{2 \pi i \frac{b}{d}(\Delta- \bar{\Delta}+m_i w_i)}.\end{equation}
elements.sent-2411-278: Now, we are going to make the following choice \begin{eqnarray}\label{restrcition} (\Delta- \bar{\Delta}+ m_i w_i) \in d. \mathbb{Z}.\end{eqnarray}.
elements.sent-2411-279: With this choice, the sum over $b$ can be trivially done and it cancels with the factor of $d$ in the denominator.
elements.sent-2411-280: We are now left with \begin{eqnarray}T_N \chi=\sum_{ad=N} \frac{1}{a} \sum_{\Delta,\bar{\Delta},\ell,\bar{\ell},m_i,w_i} c(\Delta,\bar{\Delta},\ell,\bar{\ell})q^{\frac{a}{d}\Delta+\frac{a}{d}\frac{\delta}{4}} \bar{q}^{\frac{a}{d}\bar{\Delta}+\frac{a}{d}\frac{\bar{\delta}}{4}} y^{a\ell} \bar{y}^{ a\bar{\ell}}.\end{eqnarray}.
elements.sent-2411-281: Hence, the free energy can be written as \begin{eqnarray}\mathcal{F} = \sum_{d>0} \sum_{a>0}\frac{1}{a} \sum_{\Delta,\bar{\Delta},\ell,\bar{\ell},m_i,w_i} c(\Delta,\bar{\Delta},\ell,\bar{\ell}) p^{ad}q^{\frac{a}{d}\Delta+\frac{a}{d}\frac{\delta}{4}} \bar{q}^{\frac{a}{d}\bar{\Delta}+\frac{a}{d}\frac{\bar{\delta}}{4}} y^{a\ell} \bar{y}^{ a\bar{\ell}}\nonumber =-\sum_{d>0}\sum_{\Delta,\bar{\Delta},\ell,\bar{\ell},m_i,w_i} c(\Delta,\bar{\Delta},\ell,\bar{\ell}) \, \mathrm{log} (1- p^d q^{\frac{\Delta}{d}+\frac{\delta}{4d}}\bar{q}^{\frac{\bar{\Delta}}{d}+\frac{\delta}{4d}}y^{\ell} \bar{y}^{\bar{\ell}}).\label{eq:app_F}\end{eqnarray} Note that the constraint $ad=N$ is already imposed as $p^{ad}$.
